comments.body: @mtrmac I guess all fedora versions got updated to v3 https://packages.fedoraproject.org/pkgs/docker-distribution/docker-distribution/

Falling behind on VM upgrades is not a good thing, i.e. we likely want to consume other upgrades, newer go versions, etc... so my vote would be to skip them for now so we can get these updates in and as you say test the latest version.
